semantic.role: Vitest integration test suite for semantic drift detection and LLM client behavior in the ArchSpine sync system.
responsibilities: Mocks LLMClient (DriftMockClient) to track PreviousSemanticContext usage across passes.
Sets up temporary test directories and cleans them up after each test.
Executes shell commands via execSync to simulate CLI operations in isolated environments.
Validates that the SyncService correctly handles semantic drift scenarios.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual SyncService methods in isolation.
Testing of production LLM client implementations (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic).
Performance or load testing of the sync system.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule: test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a test harness for verifying semantic drift detection in the ArchSpine sync pipeline, ensuring the system correctly passes PreviousSemanticContext across multiple passes.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Resolve lint errors and finalize pipeline fixes before v1.0, aligning with the commit message intent.

English.role: Vitest integration test suite for semantic drift detection and LLM client behavior in the ArchSpine sync system.
responsibilities: Mocks LLMClient (DriftMockClient) to track PreviousSemanticContext usage across passes.
Sets up temporary test directories and cleans them up after each test.
Executes shell commands via execSync to simulate CLI operations in isolated environments.
Validates that the SyncService correctly handles semantic drift scenarios.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual SyncService methods in isolation.
Testing of production LLM client implementations (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic).
Performance or load testing of the sync system.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于语义漂移检测和LLM客户端行为的Vitest集成测试套件，属于ArchSpine同步系统。
responsibilities: 模拟LLMClient（DriftMockClient）以跟踪多次传递中的PreviousSemanticContext使用情况。
设置临时测试目录并在每个测试后清理。
通过execSync执行shell命令，在隔离环境中模拟CLI操作。
验证SyncService是否正确处理语义漂移场景。
outOfScope: 单独测试SyncService方法的单元测试。
测试生产环境中的LLM客户端实现（例如OpenAI、Anthropic）。
同步系统的性能或负载测试。
